summary: Frontend-only verification of the new 'Projects on Customer Profile' feature (Turkish user's request). All 5 acceptance steps passed end-to-end against the preview URL. Login admin@arigastro.com/admin123 -> POST /api/auth/login 200. STEP-A (no-projects state, verified at end after cleanup): opened /musteriler/<customer_id>, waited for [data-testid=customer-detail], confirmed [data-testid=customer-projects] is ABSENT and GET /api/projects?customer_id=<id> returns items.length=0. STEP-B (create): on /projeler clicked new-project-btn, opened Sheet, clicked project-customer-select via eval_on_selector (viewport 1600x1200 per iteration_10 note), selected first customer 'Esra Butik' (id=f2d8774e-e6a0-4a43-b54b-89112829a532) via role='option', filled project-name-input='TEST_CUSTPROFILE_ZZ', project-amount-input=8500, currency=EUR (default), clicked save-project-btn -> POST /api/projects 200, project_id=46e48ad7-e74f-433f-a217-092145d98a9e. STEP-C (verify section renders): navigated /musteriler/f2d8774e-e6a0-4a43-b54b-89112829a532 -> [data-testid=customer-projects] present, [data-testid=customer-project-row-46e48ad7-e74f-433f-a217-092145d98a9e] present, row text = 'TEST_CUSTPROFILE_ZZ€8.500,00€8.500,00€8.500,00' -> name + Projektsumme (€8.500,00) + Offenes (€8.500,00, no incomes yet) + Gewinn (€8.500,00, no expenses yet) all correctly rendered in project currency (EUR). Table headers 'Name / Projektsumme / Offenes / Gewinn' visible under 'Projekte (1)' heading. STEP-D (navigate on row click): clicked the row -> URL changed to /projeler/46e48ad7-e74f-433f-a217-092145d98a9e as expected. STEP-E (cleanup + hide section): went back to /projeler, clicked delete-project-<id> -> DELETE /api/projects/<id> 200; reopened /musteriler/<customer_id> and confirmed [data-testid=customer-projects] is now ABSENT again; final API check GET /api/projects?customer_id=<id> returned items.length=0. Only console errors seen were the expected 401s from the /me probe before login. No layout/contrast issues on the new section.
critical_code_review_comments: CustomerDetail.jsx load() correctly fires the /projects?customer_id=<id> call in a separate try/catch AFTER the primary customer+quotes await block, so a 403 (role-gated) does not break the rest of the page -- projects silently default to [] and the section is not rendered. Good defensive pattern for the sales/muhasebe/depo roles that don't have projects access.
The section is guarded by `projects.length > 0` so the customer profile stays clean for customers without projects -- verified empirically before create AND after delete.

Row click uses navigate(`/projeler/${p.id}`) instead of wrapping the <tr> in a Link (semantically correct because <a> inside <tr> is invalid HTML). cursor-pointer + hover:bg-zinc-50 give proper affordance.

Amount / remaining_receivable / profit columns pull directly from the /projects list response (which already aggregates income/expense totals per project) -- no extra per-project fetch, so the section is O(1) additional request for the profile page. Good.

Minor: the 'remaining receivable' column is rendered in text-amber-600 unconditionally even when the value is 0 (fully paid). Consider muting the color when remaining==0. Non-blocking cosmetic; not part of this iteration's scope.

success_rate.backend: not tested (frontend-only per request; iteration_9/10 already covered projects backend)

seed_data_creation: Created 1 project 'TEST_CUSTPROFILE_ZZ' (customer=Esra Butik id=f2d8774e-e6a0-4a43-b54b-89112829a532, amount=8500 EUR). DELETED at the end of the run via delete-project-<id> -> DELETE /api/projects/46e48ad7-e74f-433f-a217-092145d98a9e 200. Final GET /api/projects?customer_id=<id> returns items.length=0. Preview DB is clean.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Testids relevant to this feature on the CustomerDetail page: [data-testid=customer-detail] (root), [data-testid=customer-projects] (section wrapper -- ONLY rendered when projects.length>0), [data-testid=customer-project-row-<projectId>] (clickable <tr> that navigates to /projeler/<projectId>). To reproduce the create step from iteration_10's note: viewport 1600x1200 and open [data-testid=project-customer-select] with `await page.eval_on_selector('[data-testid="project-customer-select"]','el=>el.click()')`, then select an option via role='option' (options carry [data-testid=customer-option-<customerId>]). GET /api/projects?customer_id=<id> is tolerant: silently swallowed by CustomerDetail on 403 for role-gated users -- so if a next tester runs this as a non-admin sales user with projects access disabled in settings.projects_visible_roles, the section will (correctly) NOT show even when projects exist server-side.
rca of the issue: N/A -- this iteration is a fresh-feature acceptance run. The implementation (backend: GET /projects?customer_id filter in routes/projects.py; frontend: parallel GET /projects fetch in CustomerDetail.load() + conditional table render) works end-to-end. No regressions.
